name: mayanhvietnam-new
description: Rebuild website mayanhvietnam.com - Monorepo gồm 12 demo FE projects + admin + API. Demo apps: demo-0..demo-12, demo-shell, admin-next (8080), api (4000).

scripts.dev:all: concurrently -k -n api,admin,d0,d01,d02,d03,d04,d05,d06,d07,d08,d09,d10,d11,d12,shell -c blue,green,magenta,cyan,white,red,gray,grayBright,gray,gray,gray,gray,gray,gray,gray,grayBright "pnpm dev:api" "pnpm dev:admin" "pnpm dev:demo-0" "pnpm dev:demo-01" "pnpm dev:demo-02" "pnpm dev:demo-03" "pnpm dev:demo-04" "pnpm dev:demo-05" "pnpm dev:demo-06" "pnpm dev:demo-07" "pnpm dev:demo-08" "pnpm dev:demo-09" "pnpm dev:demo-10" "pnpm dev:demo-11" "pnpm dev:demo-12" "pnpm dev:shell"
scripts.dev:web: concurrently -k -n d0,d01,d02,d03,d04,d05,d06,d07,d08,d09,d10,d11,d12,shell -c magenta,cyan,white,red,gray,grayBright,gray,gray,gray,gray,gray,gray,gray,grayBright "pnpm dev:demo-0" "pnpm dev:demo-01" "pnpm dev:demo-02" "pnpm dev:demo-03" "pnpm dev:demo-04" "pnpm dev:demo-05" "pnpm dev:demo-06" "pnpm dev:demo-07" "pnpm dev:demo-08" "pnpm dev:demo-09" "pnpm dev:demo-10" "pnpm dev:demo-11" "pnpm dev:demo-12" "pnpm dev:shell"
